title: cynoctonum scoparium
intro: Cynoctonum scoparium, commonly known as bearberry or kinnikinnick, is a low-growing, woody shrub native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include being a diuretic and an antiseptic, due to its high concentration of arbutin, a compound that has antibacterial and antifungal properties. The health benefits of bearberry include its potential to help treat urinary tract infections, reduce inflammation, and even help manage type 2 diabetes. Bearberry can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
